title: Specify surfaces.json
description: Validates the structure of a source survey surfaces file. One file per legacy-code source, recording externally observable surfaces and their code footprints. Defined by RFC-20 §Artifacts.

version.description: Schema version. Must be 1; bumps require an RFC update.

source-key.description: Kebab-case identifier for the legacy source this file describes.

language.description: Primary programming language of the source (e.g. typescript, python).

surfaces.description: Externally observable surfaces sorted by id. Empty when no detector found applicable surfaces.

id.description: Stable identifier unique within this file. The per-language enumeration brief produces it; reruns diff cleanly.

kind.description: Closed surface kind enum. Extensions require an RFC update.

identifier.description: Legacy spelling of the observable surface (route, topic, command, etc.).

handler.description: Handler or call site reference, typically file:function.

touches.description: Source files reached from the handler, sorted alphabetically. Relative to the source root.

declared-at.description: Declaration sites where the surface is registered with its framework, sorted alphabetically. Non-empty; relative paths optionally suffixed with :line.
